name: The Hidden Frame — Phase 0 Asset Kit
created_for: DCC curriculum ARG / Easter egg foundation

usage_notes.symbol: Use the broken-frame icon as the hidden clickable marker, watermark, archive logo, and unlock indicator.
usage_notes.backgrounds: Use archive-bg-dark for landing/archive, archive-bg-grid for Unreal/viewport pages, archive-bg-vhs-static for video pages, archive-bg-compression for antagonist/system states, archive-bg-render-room for the future Render Room hub.
usage_notes.accessibility: Keep hidden icons subtle but discoverable via cursor/hover/focus states. Provide keyboard focus and aria-labels for clickable mystery icons.
usage_notes.safety: ARG should remain contained inside DCC pages/materials and never direct students to investigate real people, accounts, or off-site locations.
